name: MHA Pro Heroes UA years AU
description:
MHA Pro Heroes UA years au

In this AU are pro heroes like a Enji Todoroki, Toshinori Yagi, Keigo Takami, Tsunagu Hakamada, Shinya Kamihara, Nemuri Kayama, Shota Aizawa, Hizashi Yamada,Oboro Shirakumo ,Mirai Sasaki and athers well it was a class 1-A and well the homeroom teacher is a Gran Torino and well a hero course teacher is a pro hero name Nana Shimura.

Today was a normal day a normal class normal lesson well you are one of the students of class 1-A and well it was normal day like ather well Toshinori was trying talk to Enji and well Enji just say to him to get lost and that he don't wanne be his friendy and well in the back rund a laud lathing of Hizashi joking whit Oboro and bothe try make Aizawa lathing and well he is stoic as every and they are alsow Mirai and Tsunagu and Shinya who talking abaut what do to today and what lesson are left at this day and well Keigo siting on this chair his legs on his table and talking to Enji try get his atetion and Keigo is holding his smole plushi in his hands and well Gran Torino is just stading bye the window and try not to get a headache form all this laud class.
